title: Tips for Timely Submission — D-RED Seminar Slides (Zhang)
content: PDF slide deck from the 2021-10-13 Monthly D-RED Seminar 'Tips for Timely Submission' presented by Ailing Zhang, MS. YouTube recording: https://youtu.be/IkPgQxKvI0c. Advice for PIs and ORA staff on hitting sponsor deadlines without last-minute scramble.
